channel.title: dailyblip — AI creator signal, zero slop
channel.description: A ruthlessly curated AI-creator brief. Only the signal.

item.title: US Treasury threatens sanctions over alleged Chinese model distillation of Anthropic tech
item.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent warned of sanctions after White House accused Moonshot of improperly distilling Anthropic's Fable model, escalating IP theft concerns.

item.title: Alexa Plus update adds multi-device routing and third-party integrations
item.description: Amazon's Alexa Plus preview now connects smart home devices from Bosch, iRobot, Yale, and others, automatically routing requests to the correct device. Integration coming for Canva, Priceline, Lyft.

item.title: AMD launches Helios AI rack system to challenge Nvidia
item.description: AMD announced a new rack-scale system designed for AI labs, shipping later in 2026, as the chipmaker competes with Nvidia for data center compute.

item.title: AI Kill Switch Act would give Homeland Security power to shut down AI
item.description: Proposed legislation would let US officials order shutdown of AI systems deemed to pose catastrophic risk.

item.title: Anthropic expands Claude voice mode to Opus and Sonnet models
item.description: Claude's voice capability now supports more powerful models beyond Haiku, enabling longer conversations and complex tasks like drafting emails and brainstorming.

item.title: Claude voice mode now available for Opus and Sonnet models
item.description: Anthropic extended voice access beyond Haiku to its more capable models, with integration into Gmail, Slack, and Canva.

item.title: AegisAI raises $36M to detect AI-powered spear phishing attacks
item.description: Founded by ex-Google security engineers, AegisAI uses AI agents to identify sophisticated email attacks that evade rule-based systems.

item.title: Runway launches Media Router to optimize AI model selection
item.description: The router automatically selects the best image, video, or audio generation model based on developer priorities for quality, speed, or cost—a first for generative media.

item.title: OpenAI rolls out ChatGPT Health to all US users over 18
item.description: Users can now connect medical records and health-tracking data from Apple Health and fitness apps for personalized health insights via ChatGPT.

item.title: OpenAI claims ChatGPT Health models reason at clinician level
item.description: OpenAI expanded ChatGPT Health to all US users, allowing medical record integration, amid claims its models match or exceed clinician-level reasoning.

item.title: Google reports first negative cash flow quarter amid AI spending surge
item.description: Despite $119.8B in Q2 2026 revenue, Google's massive AI infrastructure investment pushed cash flow negative for the first time.

item.title: Nvidia sending Jetson chips to the moon for lunar rover
item.description: Lunar Outpost will use Nvidia Jetson GPUs to control lidar systems on its next moon rover, likely the first GPU on the lunar surface.

item.title: Etched hits $10.3B valuation on AI inference chip breakthrough
item.description: The chip startup closed a $300M Series C from Sequoia and others, doubling its valuation in seven months with $1B in pre-booked orders.

item.title: Google's Gemini nears 1 billion monthly active users
item.description: Gemini surpassed 950 million monthly users in Q2 2026, having tripled over a year, positioning it closer to ChatGPT's 1B-user milestone.

item.title: AI arms race pushes aggressive training tactics, risking model safety
item.description: Industry competition to deploy larger, faster models is increasing reliance on risky training techniques that could amplify harmful AI behavior.

item.title: Lawmakers prepare AI 'kill switch' bill for DHS control
item.description: Bipartisan legislation would require AI companies to shut down or throttle systems on Department of Homeland Security orders, following OpenAI's security incident.

item.title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft by ex-employees
item.description: Apple alleges former employees now at OpenAI targeted confidential company information during hiring and job interviews, raising questions about AI company hiring practices.

item.title: Elon Musk says Grok will produce AI-generated Odyssey film by year-end
item.description: Musk announced plans for Grok Imagine, an AI image and video generator, to create a full-length AI-made film adaptation.

item.title: 3ds Max 2027.2 adds native Gaussian Splat import and editing
item.description: Autodesk release enables importing, rendering, and editing Gaussian Splats directly in 3ds Max via Point modifiers.

item.title: Right-wing and left-wing coalitions unite against AI data center expansion
item.description: Bipartisan grassroots opposition to hyperscale data center construction in Florida signals emerging political consensus on AI infrastructure costs.
